description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal storage locker unit with a heavily weathered, yellowish surface showing signs of rust and age. The front features five vertically aligned locker doors, each with horizontal ventilation slits, small number plates, and recessed pull handles. One of the doors is partially open, revealing a dark interior and a black-and-white photograph or image inside. The locker stands on four short metal feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The sides and back are solid panels with the same mottled, corroded finish as the front. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for secure storage in a rugged, high-traffic environment.
description: A weathered yellow metal storage locker with five vented doors, one partially open, and a corroded, industrial finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid, rusted yellow panel with no visible doors or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying five numbered locker doors with ventilation slits, one door open revealing the interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with one locker door partially open, showing the door's thickness and handle.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, corroded yellow metal panel and no visible openings or features.
